bots.sourceText:
;@slot1 MINE
;@slot2 EMPTY
;@slot3 EMPTY

LABEL LOOP
  USE_SLOT1 NONE
  WAIT 10
  GOTO LOOP

LABEL LOOP
  TARGET_CLOSEST_MINE
  IF (HAS_TARGET_MINE()) DO MOVE_TO_TARGET
  GOTO LOOP
